Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/drug characteristics 
research files. The guide includes several ways for users to quickly find the information they need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on their SAS
